Title: Dedicates a pedestrian bridge in the hamlet of Seaford to the victims of the Abbey Gate attack
Summary: Dedicates a pedestrian bridge in the hamlet of Seaford to the victims of the Abbey Gate attack located in the town of Hempstead, county of Nassau.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the highway law, in relation to designating a Seaford pedestrian bridge as the "Abbey Gate Memorial Bridge"
